description: Deferred review items. Each entry preserves full context (comment text, file:line, PR link) so the fix can be implemented later without losing context. At every phase integration test, open items targeting that phase MUST be verified and either resolved or carried forward.

items.item: Unify db.ts + store-driver.ts SQLite connections into single factory to prevent SQLITE_BUSY in transaction callbacks
items.context: The createStoreDriver() and createDb() each open their own bun:sqlite connection. If transaction() callback tries to write through a Drizzle client from createDb(), it will hit SQLITE_BUSY because BEGIN IMMEDIATE holds a write lock. Mitigation added (busy_timeout=5000 in db.ts) but root fix requires a single connection factory shared between StoreDriver and Drizzle ORM client.

items.item: Add proper transaction isolation test using driver-managed shared connection handle instead of external raw SQL
items.context: The 'maintains database state after commit (AC4)' test in store-driver.test.ts performs raw SQL insert outside driver.transaction(), completely bypassing the transaction logic it claims to test. Once connections are unified (DEF-001), rewrite this test to perform SQL inside the transaction callback using the shared connection handle, and verify correct commit/rollback behavior.
